assessment.note: Carl described being distracted by many things, indicating a lack of clarity and reduced engagement.

new_queue.label: Focus area priorities
new_queue.name: What are your top three priorities for the next month?
new_queue.description: Aims to clarify Carl's immediate priorities and ensure alignment.

new_queue.label: Current workload sustainability
new_queue.name: How sustainable does your current workload feel over the long term?
new_queue.description: Explores whether Carl's workload is manageable and sustainable.

new_queue.label: Delegation strategy
new_queue.name: How do you decide which tasks to delegate to your team?
new_queue.description: Investigates Carl's approach to delegation and its effectiveness.

new_queue.label: Workload impact
new_queue.name: How do you feel your workload is affecting your ability to innovate and propose new ideas?
new_queue.description: Explores the impact of workload on Carl's creativity and initiative.

new_queue.label: Energy sustainability
new_queue.name: What changes would make your workload feel more sustainable?
new_queue.description: Explores potential adjustments to improve Carl's workload sustainability.
